mapper.select:
SELECT q.*, c.name AS customer_name, u.real_name AS creator_name FROM crm_quotation q LEFT JOIN crm_customer c ON q.customer_id = c.id AND c.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON q.creator_id = u.id
q.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (q.quotation_no LIKE '%' || #{keywords} || '%' OR c.name LIKE '%' || #{keywords} || '%')
AND q.customer_id = #{customerId} AND q.opportunity_id = #{opportunityId} AND q.status = #{status} AND q.created_at >= #{startDate}::timestamp AND q.created_at <= #{endDate}::timestamp
ORDER BY q.created_at DESC
